internship.parent_org: Government of India, Ministry of Electronics & IT
internship.extension_context: Merit-based extension after performance review by senior scientists. Transitioned from user management system to leading data engineering work on reporting pipeline.

fads.name: FADS: Digitization of Accounting System
fads.client: Financial Advisor and Deputy Secretary, Government of Maharashtra
fads.summary: Digitized manual proforma accounting system. Handles consolidated accounting from district offices, calculates financial ratios, generates adjustment entries.

rbac.detail: Admin can grant/deny per-operation access per role. Navbar dynamically shows/hides items based on permissions.

auth.what: Session-based authentication with multiple security layers
auth.detail: CryptoJS SHA1 client-side password hashing, GD-generated CAPTCHA, account lockout after 3 failed attempts (configurable via globals table).

csv_etl.what: CSV ingestion and ETL pipeline for food grain distribution reports
csv_etl.detail: Upload CSV food grain reports, parse and insert into PostgreSQL, view/edit imported data, calculate aggregated financial ratios.
csv_etl.etl_flow: CSV ingestion → parsing → PostgreSQL storage → automated financial ratio calculation (MRA/TRA and Moffusil percentages) → adjustment entry generation for district offices across Maharashtra

financial_calcs.detail: Uses ratio_table with MRA/TRA and Moffusil percentages by fiscal year.

audit.what: Full audit trail and exception logging
audit.detail: Logs all user actions. Exception log captures errors with file location and active user.

globals.detail: Lock timeout, nav branding, etc. Editable without code changes.

mail_tracking.name: Mail Tracking System (Letter Management)
mail_tracking.summary: Internal mail/letter tracking for NIC. Captures letter images, stores metadata, sends email with embedded tracking pixel, updates status to 'Opened' when recipient views.

features.image_capture: Base64 image POST to /letter/captureLetter, saved to disk, filename returned
features.email_tracking: Tracking pixel (/letter/opened/:id) updates letter status to 'Opened' in MongoDB
features.url_rewriting: localhost image URLs rewritten to ngrok PROD_URL for external tracking
features.auth: Session-based with bcrypt password hashing, MongoDB session store

shared_facts.documentation: Co-authored SRS and SDD documentation approved by Senior Director (Scientist F), NIC Mumbai

steamlensai.name: SteamLensAI
steamlensai.summary: Distributed GPU-accelerated pipeline for analyzing Steam game reviews at scale. Semantic topic assignment + hierarchical text summarization using transformers distributed across Dask workers sharing a single GPU.

pipeline.phase1: Topic Assignment: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 → review embeddings → semantic match against game themes. 1.2M reviews in ~2.5 min.
pipeline.phase2: Hierarchical Summarization: DistilBART (sshleifer/distilbart-cnn-12-6) → positive/negative review summaries per topic. 1.2M reviews in ~8 min.

core_challenge.problem: Standard dask.scatter() fails with GPU-resident models (can't serialize CUDA tensors)
core_challenge.solution: CPU-serialize-GPU pattern: load model on CPU → distribute via publish_dataset() → each worker moves copy to GPU
core_challenge.result: 4-8 independent model instances sharing one RTX 4080 (16GB VRAM), ~100% GPU utilization

features.hardware_adaptive: Auto-tunes worker count, batch size, chunk size based on detected GPU VRAM/RAM/CPU
features.end_to_end: Parquet ingestion → semantic topic assignment → hierarchical summarization → CSV export via Streamlit UI
features.monitoring: Dask dashboard, chunk-level progress tracking, phase timing metrics

nyc_transit_hub.name: NYC Transit Hub
nyc_transit_hub.achievement: Won 1st Place at NYU Leetcode Bootcamp Hackathon
nyc_transit_hub.summary: Real-time NYC transit system covering subway, LIRR, Metro-North. Interactive Mapbox map with live arrivals, service alerts, per-line/per-feed detail pages. Parses static GTFS (~500MB) and live GTFS-RT protobuf feeds.

features.api: Single unified route /api/transit: accepts ?type=[subway|lirr|mnr]&feed=[optional], fetches GTFS-RT protobuf, decodes, returns JSON
features.static_data: 500MB+ static GTFS data parsed at runtime with in-memory caching
features.map: Interactive Mapbox map with train line filtering, station selection, color-coded status indicators

campusnest.name: CampusNest
campusnest.summary: University housing platform for NYC students (NYU, Columbia, Fordham, CUNY, Pace, The New School). Roommates, housing listings, buy/sell marketplace, messaging. Enforces .edu email registration.

auth.detail: AbstractUser + .edu regex validation, token-based email verification, role-based access, self-messaging DB constraint

messaging.detail: Thread-based conversations per listing, smart auto-scroll, read/unread tracking, N+1 prevented with select_related/prefetch_related

thread_dedup.detail: Canonical user ordering (user_a.id < user_b.id) with unique constraint, get_or_create pattern

roommate_matching.detail: Pending/accepted/rejected states. Lifestyle preference matching: diet, smoking, pets, cleanliness, budget

search.detail: Listings: keyword, budget range, location, dates, amenities. Marketplace: keyword, category, price range.

media.detail: AWS S3 for production media (v1). Multi-image listings and marketplace items.

cicd_v1.detail: Travis CI → black/flake8 → tests+coverage → Coveralls → auto-deploy to AWS Elastic Beanstalk

security.detail: @login_required on all views, thread authorization (403), CSRF, XSS prevention

numerai.name: Numerai Stock Market Prediction Pipeline
numerai.resume_header: Numerai Stock Prediction | Python, LightGBM, PyTorch, scikit-learn, CUDA, Jupyter
numerai.context: ML course final project (NeurIPS-style report). Submitted to Numerai Tournament.
numerai.summary: End-to-end ML pipeline for stock return ranking prediction. Compares Linear Regression, Random Forest, LightGBM with era-based time-series validation, GPU acceleration, ensemble averaging.

era_splits.detail: Random splits caused data leakage (inflated Spearman 0.12 vs honest 0.0549). Eras are temporal: mixing lets model peek at future data.

memory_opt.detail: float32 precision (50% reduction), explicit garbage collection, prevented OOM.

gpu_accel.detail: Offloads histogram construction and split finding. CPU 152s → GPU 15s (10.1x speedup).

preprocessing.detail: StandardScaler fit on training data only, applied to test.

xv6_tracer.name: xv6 Syscall Tracer
xv6_tracer.resume_header: xv6 Syscall Tracer | C, xv6, QEMU, x86 Assembly, ANSI C
xv6_tracer.context: OS course project: extended MIT's xv6 teaching OS
xv6_tracer.summary: Extended xv6 with 6 new kernel syscalls implementing Linux strace-like tracing: per-process trace enable/disable, circular dump buffer, filter flags.

features.trace: trace(val): enable/disable tracing per process via proc->trace, supports fork inheritance
features.tracedump: tracedump(): prints last 10 records from circular buffer in kernel space
features.filters: setEFlag(n)/setSFlag/setFFlag: global kernel filter flags for syscall number, success-only, failure-only
features.outputtrace: outputtrace(buf, size): copies 36KB kernel trace buffer to user-space via pointer

personality_prediction.name: Personality Prediction for CV Analysis
personality_prediction.summary: ML system predicting OCEAN personality traits from CV/resume to assist recruiters. Resume parsing + psychometric questionnaire + ML classification.

features.resume_parser: pyresparser (spaCy + NLTK) extracts structured data from PDF/DOCX. Maps against ~306 OCEAN keyword elements.
features.questionnaire: Psychometric questionnaire scored out of 10, combined with parsed resume for dual-signal assessment.
features.ml_module: Classifies candidates into personality types using OCEAN values scaled 1-10.

patchbotai.name: PatchbotAI
patchbotai.summary: Minimal agentic coding assistant using Gemini function calling to autonomously read, write, and execute code in a sandboxed directory.

features.agent_loop: Up to 20 steps: call Gemini → dispatch function_call → append tool results → repeat until plain text or step limit
features.safety: Path containment enforced: no traversal outside sandbox directory
features.abstraction: Each function exports callable + typed Gemini FunctionDeclaration schema for automatic registration

localpilotai.name: LocalPilotAI
localpilotai.summary: Fully offline AI code autocompletion VSCode extension. Runs qwen2.5-coder:7b locally via Ollama. No external API, complete privacy, sub-200ms completions.

features.manual_completion: Ctrl+Space: captures full context line 0 to cursor, ollama.generate(), inserts as snippet
features.inline_completion: CompletionItemProvider (dot trigger in Python/JS): ollama.chat(), returns CompletionItem
features.prompt_engineering: formatPrompt() wraps context in system prompt instructing model to output exactly one line, no markdown

simplifyjobsdaemon.name: SimplifyJobsDaemon
simplifyjobsdaemon.summary: Background daemon monitoring SimplifyJobs GitHub feed every 30 min, scrapes new postings, uses local LLM to select projects, generates tailored resume PDF, sends desktop notification. Fully automated + offline.

go_daemon.simplifyapi: HTTP client fetching listings.json from GitHub
go_daemon.ai: HTTP client to local Flask/Ollama server
go_daemon.resume: Subprocess call to Python resume editor for tailored PDF

python_services.llm_server: Flask on port 5000, proxies to Ollama. Input: {job_description, projects[]}, Output: {selected_projects[], reasoning}
python_services.resume_editor: Takes .odt template + projects.json + --keep list → tailored PDF via odfpy

features.sponsorship_filter: Keeps 'Offers Sponsorship' and 'Other', drops 'U.S. Citizenship Required' and 'Does Not Offer Sponsorship'

achievements.text: Won 1st Place at NYU Leetcode Bootcamp Hackathon
Co-authored and published "Personality Prediction for CV Analysis" in ICRMIR-2023
